tracks.rawText: 4:20BillieUploadIndie pop ballad featuring a blend of organic and electronic elements, The arrangement centers on a clean, fingerpicked acoustic guitar and a resonant grand piano, A sub-heavy synth bass provides low-end weight, while the percussion consists of a crisp, mid-tempo electronic beat with a prominent snap on the backbeat and subtle hi-hat syncopation, High-register male vocals utilize a mix of breathy chest voice and clear falsetto, processed with moderate plate reverb and short delay, Atmospheric synth pads and occasional string-like swells fill the stereo field, The track is in the key of G Major at 75 BPM in 4/4 time9PublishRemix
tracks.title: Billie

tracks.rawText: 4:00"Beyond the Orbit"v5.5The song fuses progressive and alternative metal with aggressive, syncopated riffs and abrupt time signature changes, Middle Eastern/Armenian scales color guitar leads and atmospheric passages, while percussive drumming alternates between pounding double-kick and folk-inspired rhythms, Dynamic shifts move from haunting, sparse verses to explosive, multi-layered choruses, featuring complex textures and angular bass lines, Distorted guitars intertwine with brief, dissonant oud or duduk flourishes for ethnic authenticity1PublishRemix
tracks.title: "Beyond the Orbit"
